summary: laying down rules for the application of Regulation (EU) No 910/2014 of the European Parliament and of the Council as regards requirements for qualified trust service providers providing qualified trust services Qualified trust service providers play a crucial role in ensuring secure and reliable digital interactions by delivering qualified trust services in compliance with Regulation (EU) No 910/2014. For qualified trust services for the issuance of qualified certificates for electronic signatures: clauses 5.2, 6.1, 6.4, 6.5, 6.8 and 6.9 of the standard as referenced and adapted in point 1 of Annex I to Commission Implementing Regulation (EU) 2025/1943  ( 1 ) .
title: Qualified trust service providers
